---
title: "Carbones Concern"
author: "Dipankor Dhrubo"
date: "2025-12-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(umap)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(factoextra)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(tableone)

```


```{r}
NSCLC_metadata<- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds")

timeline_long_norm<- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLCORIEN_Treatment_simplified_longformat_data.csv") %>% select(sample) %>% unique()

all_scores<- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/tmesig_NSCLC.csv") %>% select(sample,buffa.score)

Histology_hypoxia<- NSCLC_metadata %>% select(sample, Histology, CAlevel) %>% left_join(all_scores, by="sample") %>% drop_na() %>% filter(sample %in% timeline_long_norm$sample)
Histology_hypoxia<- Histology_hypoxia %>% mutate(Histology = factor(Histology),
                                                 CAlevel = factor(CAlevel))


## Squamous Cell Carcinoma vs AdrenoCarcinoma

## High candida proportion 

ggplot(Histology_hypoxia, aes(x = Histology, fill = CAlevel)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  ylab("Proportion") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9)
  )

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous_vs_adreno.png",width = 5, height = 2, dpi = 300)



```


```{r}



## High candida proportion 

ggplot(
  Histology_hypoxia,
  aes(x = CAlevel, y = buffa.score, fill = CAlevel)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ Histology) +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test",
    label = "p.format"
  ) +
  ylab("Buffa Hypoxia Score") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 7),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    strip.text   = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    legend.position = "none"
  )


ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous_vs_adreno_hypoxia.svg", width = 5, height = 3, dpi = 300)


m1 <- lm(
  buffa.score ~ CAlevel * Histology,
  data = Histology_hypoxia
)
summary(m1)



```



```{r}

## Histology Survival

Histology_survival<- NSCLC_metadata %>% select(sample, Histology, CAlevel,status,diagsurvtime) %>% left_join(all_scores, by="sample") %>% drop_na() %>% filter(!Histology %in% c("Unknown","Other")) %>% filter(sample %in% timeline_long_norm$sample)



make_km <- function(h) {

  df_h <- Histology_survival %>%
    filter(Histology == h)

  fit_h <- survfit(
    Surv(diagsurvtime, status) ~ CAlevel,
    data = df_h
  )

  ggsurvplot(
    fit_h,
    data       = df_h,
    pval       = TRUE,
    risk.table = TRUE,
    conf.int   = FALSE,
    legend.labs  = c("Low", "High"),
    legend.title = "Candida (CAlevel)",
    title      = h,

    # 👇 KEY PART
    xlim       = c(0, 5),          # restrict to 5 years
    break.time.by = 1              # 1-year intervals
  )
}



p_adeno <- make_km("Adenocarcinoma")

p_adeno$plot <- p_adeno$plot +
  theme(
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold"),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold")
  )



p_squam <- make_km("Squamous Cell Carcinoma")

p_squam$plot <- p_squam$plot +
  theme(
    plot.title   = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.title   = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold"),
    axis.text    = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold")
  )

ggarrange(
  p_adeno$plot,
  p_squam$plot,
  ncol = 2
)


ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous_vs_adreno_survival.svg", width = 7, height = 3, dpi = 300)

```


```{r}

NSCLC_metadata<- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds")
Refined_timeline<- read_csv("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Function_files/Refined_intervals.csv")


segs <- Refined_timeline %>%
  left_join(
    NSCLC_metadata %>% select(sample, Stage, Histology,Age, Primary_Met,Sex, BMI, status_f,diagsurvtime,SmokingStatus,CAlevel),
    by = "sample"
  ) %>% filter(!Stage == "Unknown") %>% unique()

segs<- segs %>% filter(!is.na(Histology))

tx_cols <- c(
  Radiation      = "#8B6BB7",
  Chemo          = "#F28E2B",
  IO             = "#59A14F",
  Hormone        = "#E15759",
  Targeted       = "#4E79A7",
  Small_Molecule = "#76B7B2",
  Ancillary      = "#E1BE6A",  # mustard
  Others         = "#7E6148",  # brown
  None           = "#C0C0C0"   # neutral light gray
)
prep_segs <- function(segs, horizon_years = 5, catch_all = "Others") {
  segs %>%
    mutate(type_raw = as.character(type)) %>%
    mutate(
      type = case_when(
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("radiation|\\brt\\b|xrt|imrt|sbrt|radiother", TRUE)) ~ "Radiation",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("\\bio\\b|immuno|pembro|nivol|atezo|ipi|pd-1|pd-l1|ctla", TRUE)) ~ "IO",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("chemo|chemotherapy|platin|taxel|5fu|gemcitabine|doxo", TRUE)) ~ "Chemo",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("hormone|endocrine|androgen|estrogen|tamox|abiraterone|enzalu|aromatase|letro|anastro|fulves", TRUE)) ~ "Hormone",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("target|tki|inhibitor|egfr|alk|braf|mek|parp|her2|trast", TRUE)) ~ "Targeted",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("small[ _-]?molecule|onco.?drug|oncodrug", TRUE)) ~ "Small_Molecule",
        str_detect(type_raw, regex("ancillary|support|palliat", TRUE)) ~ "Ancillary",
        TRUE ~ catch_all
      ),
      t0 = pmax(0, pmin(start_year, horizon_years)),
      t1 = pmax(0, pmin(end_year,   horizon_years))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample), t1 > t0)
}

# ---- compute row order for ALL patients ----
dominant_order <- function(segs_clip, treatment_order) {
  per_type <- segs_clip %>%
    group_by(sample, type) %>%
    summarise(dur = sum(t1 - t0), .groups = "drop")
  
  totals <- per_type %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    summarise(total = sum(dur), .groups = "drop")
  
  # dominant type + share
  dom <- per_type %>%
    group_by(sample) %>%
    slice_max(dur, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    left_join(totals, by = "sample") %>%
    transmute(sample,
              dom_type  = type,
              dom_share = if_else(total > 0, dur / total, 0))
  
  # earliest start for dominant type
  earliest_dom <- segs_clip %>%
    group_by(sample, type) %>%
    summarise(earliest = min(t0), .groups = "drop") %>%
    inner_join(dom, by = c("sample", "type" = "dom_type"))
  
  dom %>%
    left_join(earliest_dom %>% select(sample, earliest), by = "sample") %>%
    mutate(
      dom_type = fct_relevel(
  factor(dom_type),
  intersect(treatment_order, levels(factor(dom_type)))),
      ord1 = as.integer(dom_type),
      ord2 = -dom_share,
      ord3 = earliest
    ) %>%
    arrange(ord1, ord2, ord3) %>%
    transmute(
      sample,
      sample_factor = factor(sample, levels = rev(sample)),  # top row = first
      dom_type = fct_drop(dom_type),
      dom_share,
      earliest
    )
}

plot_all_timeline <- function(
  segs,
  horizon_years = 5,
  facet_var = "Stage",   # 👈 NEW
  treatment_order = c("Radiation","Chemo","IO","Hormone",
                      "Targeted","Small_Molecule","Ancillary","Others","None"),
  catch_all = "Other",
  line_width = 0.9,
  base_size = 16,
  title_size = 22,
  axis_title_size = 14,
  axis_text_size = 12,
  legend_title_size = 14,
  legend_text_size = 12,
  bold = TRUE
) {

  segs_clip <- prep_segs(segs, horizon_years = horizon_years, catch_all = catch_all)

  # keep only existing treatment types
  present_types   <- sort(unique(segs_clip$type))
  treatment_order <- intersect(treatment_order, present_types)

  # ⬇️ compute ordering *within each facet*
  plot_df <- segs_clip %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[facet_var]]) %>%
    dplyr::group_modify(~ {
      ord <- dominant_order(.x, treatment_order)
      .x %>%
        dplyr::inner_join(
          ord %>% dplyr::select(sample, sample_factor),
          by = "sample"
        )
    }) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(type = factor(type, levels = treatment_order))

  pal <- tx_cols[treatment_order]

  ggplot(plot_df) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(x = t0, xend = t1,
          y = sample_factor, yend = sample_factor,
          colour = type),
      linewidth = line_width, lineend = "butt"
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = pal,
      breaks = treatment_order,
      limits = treatment_order,
      drop = FALSE,
      name = "Treatment Type"
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, horizon_years),
      breaks = 0:horizon_years,
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01))
    ) +
    facet_wrap(
      as.formula(paste("~", facet_var)),
      scales = "free_y"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Treatment Timeline — Ordered by types",
      x = "Time Since First Treatment (years)",
      y = "Patient"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      legend.position    = "right",
      axis.text.y        = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y       = element_blank(),
      text          = element_text(face = if (bold) "bold" else "plain"),
      plot.title    = element_text(size = title_size, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title    = element_text(size = axis_title_size),
      axis.text     = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
      legend.title  = element_text(size = legend_title_size),
      legend.text   = element_text(size = legend_text_size)
    )
}

p <- plot_all_timeline(
  segs,
  horizon_years = 5,
  facet_var = "Stage"
)

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/treatment_timeline_by_stage.png",
  plot     = p,
  width    = 14,      # inches (adjust if many stages)
  height   = 8,       # increase if facets are tall
  dpi      = 300      # journal-quality
)


### Timeline plot for adreno carcinoma

segs_adreno<- segs %>% filter(Histology == "Adenocarcinoma")


p <- plot_all_timeline(
  segs_adreno,
  horizon_years = 5,
  facet_var = "Stage"
)

ggsave(
  filename = "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/treatment_timeline_by_stage_Adreno.png",
  plot     = p,
  width    = 14,      # inches (adjust if many stages)
  height   = 8,       # increase if facets are tall
  dpi      = 300      # journal-quality
)

### Timeline plot for adreno carcinoma

segs_Squa<- segs %>% filter(Histology == "Squamous Cell Carcinoma")


p <- plot_all_timeline(
  segs_Squa,
  horizon_years = 5,
  facet_var = "Stage"
)

ggsave(
  filename = "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/treatment_timeline_by_stage_Squam.png",
  plot     = p,
  width    = 14,      # inches (adjust if many stages)
  height   = 8,       # increase if facets are tall
  dpi      = 300      # journal-quality
)

```

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

meta1 <- NSCLC_metadata %>%
  select(sample, Stage, Histology, Age, Primary_Met, Sex, BMI,
         status_f, diagsurvtime, SmokingStatus, CAlevel) %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    Stage        = dplyr::first(na.omit(Stage)),
    Histology    = dplyr::first(na.omit(Histology)),
    Age          = dplyr::first(na.omit(Age)),
    Primary_Met  = dplyr::first(na.omit(Primary_Met)),
    Sex          = dplyr::first(na.omit(Sex)),
    BMI          = dplyr::first(na.omit(BMI)),
    status_f     = dplyr::first(na.omit(status_f)),
    diagsurvtime = dplyr::first(na.omit(diagsurvtime)),
    SmokingStatus= dplyr::first(na.omit(SmokingStatus)),
    CAlevel      = dplyr::first(na.omit(CAlevel)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

has_concurrent_chemo_io <- function(df) {

  df2 <- df %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      type = as.character(type),
      t0   = as.numeric(start_year),
      t1   = as.numeric(end_year)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(t0 = pmin(t0, t1, na.rm = TRUE),   # safety if swapped
                  t1 = pmax(t0, t1, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t0), !is.na(t1))

  chemo <- df2[df2$type == "Chemo", , drop = FALSE]
  io    <- df2[df2$type == "IO",    , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(chemo) == 0 || nrow(io) == 0) return(FALSE)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(chemo))) {
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(io))) {
      if (max(chemo$t0[i], io$t0[j]) < min(chemo$t1[i], io$t1[j])) return(TRUE)
    }
  }
  FALSE
}

has_concurrent_chemo_radiation <- function(df) {

  df2 <- df %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      type = as.character(type),
      t0   = as.numeric(start_year),
      t1   = as.numeric(end_year)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(t0 = pmin(t0, t1, na.rm = TRUE),   # safety if swapped
                  t1 = pmax(t0, t1, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(t0), !is.na(t1))

  chemo <- df2[df2$type == "Chemo", , drop = FALSE]
  rad    <- df2[df2$type == "Radiation",    , drop = FALSE]

  if (nrow(chemo) == 0 || nrow(rad) == 0) return(FALSE)

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(chemo))) {
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(rad))) {
      if (max(chemo$t0[i], rad$t0[j]) < min(chemo$t1[i], rad$t1[j])) return(TRUE)
    }
  }
  FALSE
}



pt_tbl <- Refined_timeline %>%
  left_join(meta1, by = "sample") %>%
  filter(Stage != "Unknown") %>%
  mutate(type = ifelse(is.na(type), "None", as.character(type))) %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    Stage = first(Stage),
    Histology = first(Histology),
    Age = first(Age),
    Sex = first(Sex),
    BMI = first(BMI),
    Primary_Met = first(Primary_Met),
    status_f = first(status_f),
    diagsurvtime = first(diagsurvtime),
    SmokingStatus = first(SmokingStatus),
    CAlevel = first(CAlevel),

    ever_Chemo = any(type == "Chemo"), 
    ever_IO = any(type == "IO"),  
    ever_Rad = any(type == "Radiation"), 
    ever_Target = any(type == "Targeted"), 
    ever_SM = any(type == "Small_Molecule"), 
    ever_Horm = any(type == "Hormone"), 
    ever_Anc = any(type == "Ancillary"), 
    ever_Other = any(type == "Other"), 
    ever_Chemo_IO = any(type == "Chemo") & any(type == "IO"), 
    ever_Chemo_Rad = any(type == "Chemo") & any(type == "Radiation"), 
    concurrent_Chemo_IO = has_concurrent_chemo_io(cur_data()),
    concurrent_Chemo_rad = has_concurrent_chemo_radiation (cur_data()),

    .groups = "drop"
  )


pt_tbl$Histology<- factor(pt_tbl$Histology)

library(tableone)

listVars <- c("BMI","Age","Sex","Stage","Histology","Primary_Met",
              "status_f","diagsurvtime","SmokingStatus","CAlevel",
              "ever_Chemo","ever_IO","ever_Chemo_IO","concurrent_Chemo_IO","ever_Rad","ever_Chemo_Rad","concurrent_Chemo_rad","ever_Target","ever_SM",
              "ever_Horm","ever_Anc","ever_Other")

catVars <- c("Sex","Stage","Histology","Primary_Met","status_f",
             "SmokingStatus","CAlevel",
             "ever_Chemo","ever_IO","ever_Chemo_IO","concurrent_Chemo_IO","ever_Rad","ever_Chemo_Rad","concurrent_Chemo_rad","ever_Target","ever_SM",
             "ever_Horm","ever_Anc","ever_Other")

table1 <- CreateTableOne(vars = listVars,
                         data = pt_tbl,
                         factorVars = catVars,
                         strata = "Stage")

tbl1 <- print(
  table1,
  nonnormal = c("BMI","Age","diagsurvtime"),
  quote = FALSE,
  noSpaces = TRUE,
  showAllLevels = TRUE
)

write.csv(tbl1, "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Carbones_Concern_NSCLC_ORIEN.csv")



```


```{r}
## Selecting samples for TCC

Sample_TCC <- Refined_timeline %>%
  left_join(
    NSCLC_metadata %>% select(sample,Candida, Normalize_Candida, Stage, Histology,Age, Primary_Met,Sex, BMI, status_f,diagsurvtime,SmokingStatus,CAlevel),
    by = "sample"
  ) %>% filter(!Stage == "Unknown") %>% unique() %>% arrange(desc(Normalize_Candida))

write_csv(Sample_TCC,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/TCC_Samples.csv")

```

```{r}
## Splitting Adreno and squa

pt_tbl_adreno <-  pt_tbl %>% filter(Histology == "Adenocarcinoma")
pt_tbl_Squa <-  pt_tbl %>% filter(Histology == "Squamous Cell Carcinoma")

table1_adreno <- CreateTableOne(vars = listVars,
                         data = pt_tbl_adreno,
                         factorVars = catVars,
                         strata = "Stage")

tbl1_adreno <- print(
  table1_adreno,
  nonnormal = c("BMI","Age","diagsurvtime"),
  quote = FALSE,
  noSpaces = TRUE,
  showAllLevels = F
)

write.csv(tbl1_adreno, "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Carbones_Concern_NSCLCAdreno_ORIEN.csv")

table1_squa <- CreateTableOne(vars = listVars,
                         data = pt_tbl_Squa,
                         factorVars = catVars,
                         strata = "Stage")

tbl1_squo <- print(
  table1_squa,
  nonnormal = c("BMI","Age","diagsurvtime"),
  quote = FALSE,
  noSpaces = TRUE,
  showAllLevels = F
)

write.csv(tbl1_squo, "/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Carbones_Concern_NSCLCSqua_ORIEN.csv")

```


```{r}
### Timiline work Adreno

NSCLC_metadata <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds") %>% select(-Race) %>% 
  filter(sample %in% pt_tbl_adreno$sample)

Modified_medication_adreno <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Medication_NSCLCORIEN.rds") %>% 
  filter(sample %in% pt_tbl_adreno$sample)

Normalized_timeline_adeno <- tx_normalize(
  Modified_medication_adreno,
  NSCLC_metadata = NSCLC_metadata
)

write_csv(Normalized_timeline_adeno,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Adenocarcinoma/Normalized_timeline.csv")

Refined_timeline <- tx_intervals(Normalized_timeline_adeno,
                                    id_col   = "sample",
                                    time_col = "TimeSinceTreatmentStart",
                                    type_col = "treatment_group")


write_csv(Refined_timeline,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Adenocarcinoma/Refined_intervals.csv")

res_clust <- tx_cluster_surv(
  NSCLC_metadata = NSCLC_metadata,
  timeline_long_norm = Normalized_timeline_adeno,
  horizon_years = 5
)

Cluster_surv <- res_clust$Cluster_surv

write_csv(Cluster_surv,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Adenocarcinoma/Cluster_survival_NSCLC.csv")

```


```{r}

### Timiline work Adreno
## Preparing the main file

## Minor tweaking of the file

full_df <- Normalized_timeline_adeno %>%
  left_join(
    NSCLC_metadata %>%
      select(sample, Normalize_Candida, diagsurvtime, Sex, BMI, SmokingStatus, Histology),
    by = "sample"
  ) %>% unique()


Cluster_surv_2<- Cluster_surv %>% left_join(full_df %>% select(sample,Stage,Sex,BMI,Histology) %>% unique(),by="sample")
Cluster_surv_2<- Cluster_surv_2 %>% left_join(NSCLC_metadata %>% 
                                                select(sample,Age,ProgRecurInd,SmokingStatus) %>% unique(), by= "sample")
Cluster_surv_2 <- Cluster_surv_2 %>%
  mutate(
    SmokingStatus = case_when(
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "never") ~ "Never",
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "former|ever") ~ "Former",
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "current|active") ~ "Current",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

Cluster_surv_2<- Cluster_surv_2 %>% mutate(Stage= ifelse(Stage %in% c("I","II"), "Early","Advanced"))

dir.create("//users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Adenocarcinoma/dt_timeline", showWarnings = FALSE)
for (kc in k_cols) {
  plot_timeline_for_k(
    kc,
    Cluster_normal_Surv = Cluster_surv_2,  # or Cluster_normal_Surv_2 if that’s your current object
    segs = Refined_timeline,
    out_file = file.path("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Adenocarcinoma/dt_timeline", paste0("timelines_", kc, ".png")),
    ncols   = 3,
    x_years = 6
  )
}

Demo <- tx_focus_dt(
  Cluster_surv_2, Refined_timeline,
  kc = "Cluster_k17", cl = 17,
  focus_types  = c("Chemo"),
  n_twins      = 25,
  min_share_tx = 0.33,
  start_filter = "all" ,
  enforce_sequence = F,
  sequence_strict = F
  #cox_covars = c("Age","Sex","BMI","CAlevel")
)

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Adenocarcinoma/demo_1.png", Demo, width = 40, height = 8, dpi = 300)


```


```{r}
### Timiline work Squa

NSCLC_metadata_squa <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/NSCLC_metadata.rds") %>% select(-Race) %>% 
  filter(sample %in% pt_tbl_Squa$sample)

Modified_medication_squa <- read_rds("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Medication_NSCLCORIEN.rds") %>% 
  filter(sample %in% pt_tbl_Squa$sample)

NSCLC_timeline_squa <- tx_normalize(
  Modified_medication_squa,
  NSCLC_metadata = NSCLC_metadata_squa
)

write_csv(NSCLC_timeline_squa,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Squamous/Normalized_timeline.csv")

Refined_timeline_squa <- tx_intervals(NSCLC_timeline_squa,
                                    id_col   = "sample",
                                    time_col = "TimeSinceTreatmentStart",
                                    type_col = "treatment_group")


write_csv(Refined_timeline_squa,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Adenocarcinoma/Refined_intervals.csv")

res_clust <- tx_cluster_surv(
  NSCLC_metadata = NSCLC_metadata_squa,
  timeline_long_norm = NSCLC_timeline_squa,
  horizon_years = 5
)

Cluster_surv_squa <- res_clust$Cluster_surv

write_csv(Cluster_surv_squa,"/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Data/Squamous/Cluster_survival_NSCLC.csv")

```

```{r}

### Timiline work Squa
## Preparing the main file

## Minor tweaking of the file

full_df <- NSCLC_timeline_squa %>%
  left_join(
    NSCLC_metadata_squa %>%
      select(sample, Normalize_Candida, diagsurvtime, Sex, BMI, SmokingStatus, Histology),
    by = "sample"
  ) %>% unique()


Cluster_surv_2_squa<- Cluster_surv_squa %>% left_join(full_df %>% select(sample,Stage,Sex,BMI,Histology) %>% unique(),by="sample")
Cluster_surv_2_squa<- Cluster_surv_2_squa %>% left_join(NSCLC_metadata_squa %>% 
                                                select(sample,Age,ProgRecurInd,SmokingStatus) %>% unique(), by= "sample")
Cluster_surv_2_squa <- Cluster_surv_2_squa %>%
  mutate(
    SmokingStatus = case_when(
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "never") ~ "Never",
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "former|ever") ~ "Former",
      str_detect(tolower(SmokingStatus), "current|active") ~ "Current",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

Cluster_surv_2_squa<- Cluster_surv_2_squa %>% mutate(Stage= ifelse(Stage %in% c("I","II"), "Early","Advanced"))

dir.create("//users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous/dt_timeline", showWarnings = FALSE)


k_cols <- paste0("Cluster_k", 3:20)


# keep only those that actually exist in your data:
k_cols <- intersect(k_cols, names(Cluster_surv_squa))

for (kc in k_cols) {
  plot_timeline_for_k(
    kc,
    Cluster_normal_Surv = Cluster_surv_2_squa,  # or Cluster_normal_Surv_2 if that’s your current object
    segs = Refined_timeline_squa,
    out_file = file.path("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous/dt_timeline", paste0("timelines_", kc, ".png")),
    ncols   = 3,
    x_years = 6
  )
}

Demo <- tx_focus_dt(
  Cluster_surv_2, Refined_timeline,
  kc = "Cluster_k8", cl = 8,
  focus_types  = c("Chemo"),
  n_twins      = 90,
  min_share_tx = 0.33,
  start_filter = "all" , #"all", "single_only", "combo_only"
  enforce_sequence = T,
  sequence_strict = F,
  cox_covars = c("Age","Sex","BMI","Stage","CAlevel")
)

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Adenocarcinoma/Chemo.png", Demo, width = 40, height = 8, dpi = 300)

Demo <- tx_focus_dt(
  Cluster_surv_2_squa, Refined_timeline_squa,
  kc = "Cluster_k10", cl = 3,
  focus_types  = c("Chemo"),
  n_twins      = 40,
  min_share_tx = 0.33,
  start_filter = "all" , #"all", "single_only", "combo_only"
  enforce_sequence = F,
  sequence_strict = F,
  cox_covars = c("Age","Sex","BMI","Stage","CAlevel")
)

ggsave("/users/PAS1695/dipankor99/Github/digital-twins/exploratory/Figures/Squamous/Chemo.png", Demo, width = 40, height = 8, dpi = 300)


```
